en_title: Death Stranding Movie Targeting 2027 Shoot Date, Characters From the Games Will Appear
cn_title: 《死亡搁浅》电影计划2027年开拍，游戏角色登场
subtitle: 宏大而另类
opus_summary: 由迈克尔·萨尔诺斯基执导的《死亡搁浅》电影计划2027年开拍，剧本第二稿已提交。故事为小岛秀夫世界观下的原创作品，但会有游戏角色交叉出现。A24联合制作。

paragraphs.en: The upcoming Death Stranding movie is inching closer to becoming a reality. Director Michael Sarnoski (Pig, A Quiet Place: Day One) told Variety that he recently turned in a second draft of the script with the hope of shooting the film next year in Iceland and Northern Ireland. It seems like it will be his next project, as he told Variety he has plans for a low-budget personal project once he wraps up Death Stranding.
paragraphs.cn: 即将问世的《死亡搁浅》电影正逐渐成为现实。导演迈克尔·萨尔诺斯基（曾执导《小猪》、《寂静之地：入侵日》）向《综艺》透露，他最近提交了剧本的第二稿，希望明年在冰岛和北爱尔兰开始拍摄。看起来这将是他的下一个项目，因为他告诉《综艺》，他计划在完成《死亡搁浅》后开展一个低预算的个人项目。

paragraphs.en: Not much is known about the Death Stranding film, but it is expected to be an original story set in the universe created by Hideo Kojima. With that said, Sarnoski did tease that there are "overlapping characters" from the games that will excite fans.
paragraphs.cn: 关于《死亡搁浅》电影，目前所知不多，但预计它将是一个设定在小岛秀夫所创造的宇宙中的原创故事。话虽如此，萨尔诺斯基还是透露，影片中将出现一些让粉丝兴奋的「交叉角色」。

paragraphs.en: "I want it to feel big, but also offbeat and character driven," Sarnoski says. "This takes place in the world of the video game, but I have my own set of characters. There are some like overlapping characters that fans will be excited to see, but it’s very much my own story within this universe."
paragraphs.cn: 萨尔诺斯基说：「我希望它感觉宏大，但又另类且以角色驱动。故事发生在电子游戏的世界里，但我有自己的一组角色。有一些交叉角色会让粉丝们兴奋不已，但这本质上是我在这个宇宙中的原创故事。」

paragraphs.en: It's unclear when the Death Stranding movie will be set in relation to the games, or what characters might appear. Hideo Kojima already utilized a star-studded cast of familar film actors across both Death Stranding games, meaning it wouldn't be a stretch for Sarnoski to take advantage of them in his adaptation. Norman Reedus has already stated he would be down to reprise his role as Sam Porter Bridges in the film , but perhaps we'll see other faces like Lea Seydoux's Fragile, or Troy Baker's Higgs.
paragraphs.cn: 目前还不清楚《死亡搁浅》电影的时间线相对于游戏是何时，或有哪些角色会登场。小岛秀夫已经在两部《死亡搁浅》游戏中使用了星光熠熠的熟悉电影演员阵容，这意味着萨尔诺斯基在改编时利用他们并非难事。诺曼·瑞杜斯已经表示他愿意在电影中再次饰演山姆·波特·布里吉斯，但也许我们还会看到其他面孔，比如蕾雅·赛杜饰演的芙拉吉尔，或特洛伊·贝克饰演的希格斯。

paragraphs.en: A24 will produce the film in partnership with Ari Aster and his producing partner, Lars Knudsen. Kojima is also heavily involved with the film's production . Kojima has stated he has ideas for a third Death Stranding game , but has no plans to make it himself. In the meantime, it seems like the universe will be fleshed out in other media, as an animated TV series and anime film are also in the works .
paragraphs.cn: A24将与阿里·艾斯特及其制片搭档Lars Knudsen合作制作这部电影。小岛秀夫也深度参与了影片的制作。小岛秀夫曾表示他对第三部《死亡搁浅》游戏有想法，但并无亲自制作的计划。与此同时，这个宇宙似乎将通过其他媒介扩展，一部动画电视剧和一部动画电影也在筹备中。

paragraphs.en: In the meantime, Kojima is working on two other games: OD and Physint . The former is an episodic horror game, focusing on different kinds of fears. It's currently unclear when it will be released, but it seems to be a higher priority now that Death Stranding 2 is out the door. Physint is Kojima's return to the world of tactical espionage action and is expected to be a PlayStation 6 game.
paragraphs.cn: 与此同时，小岛秀夫还在开发另外两款游戏：《OD》和《Physint》。前者是一款章节式恐怖游戏，聚焦不同种类的恐惧。目前尚不清楚何时发售，但随着《死亡搁浅2》已正式推出，它似乎被列为更高优先级。而《Physint》则是小岛秀夫回归战术谍报动作领域的作品，预计将登陆PlayStation 6平台。

paragraphs.en: Sarnoski's latest film, The Death of Robin Hood, is out this week. IGN's review noted this "brutal period piece [is] his most niche and least accessible film yet" but found its "heady mix of mournful drama and murderous action certainly distinguish it from the litany of other Robin Hood films in existence."
paragraphs.cn: 萨尔诺斯基的最新电影《罗宾汉之死》本周上映。IGN的评测指出这部「残酷的时代剧是他迄今为止最冷门、最不容易接近的作品」，但认为其「令人迷醉的悲情戏剧与杀戮动作的混合，无疑使其有别于众多已有的其他罗宾汉电影。」

paragraphs.en: Cade Onder is a freelancer for IGN's news team. He covers all things entertainment, including gaming, film, and more. You can find him on Twitter @Cade_Onder.
paragraphs.cn: Cade Onder是IGN新闻团队的撰稿人。他报道各类娱乐内容，包括游戏、电影等。你可以在Twitter上找到他@Cade_Onder。
